steps.title: Identify what needs to be converted
steps.content: The car travels 2,100 miles using 42 gallons of gasoline. The question asks how many kilometers it travels using the same 42 gallons. We need to convert 2,100 miles to kilometers.

steps.title: Apply the unit conversion factor
steps.content: Multiply by the conversion factor 1 mile = 1.6 kilometers: $$2,100 \text{ miles} \times 1.6 \frac{\text{km}}{\text{mile}} = 3,360 \text{ km}$$ That confirms B is correct.
